subject: Great meeting you, Federico Ruosi
body:
Hi Federico Ruosi,

Really enjoyed our chat about Industrial automation, Internet infrastructure, deep tech, Good Connection, Stage: Series A–Growth. Following up with what we discussed and a couple of ideas for Atomico.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]
